items.text: Robotics startup Gritt exited stealth with $32 million to build robots that construct solar plants, with plans to expand into broader construction.
items.text_zh: 机器人初创公司 Gritt 结束隐身，携 3200 万美元融资打造建设光伏电站的机器人，后续计划拓展至更多施工场景。

items.text: Cisco Foundation AI released Antares, open-weight 350M and 1B models for localizing known vulnerabilities in codebases, with the 1B beating 753B GLM-5.2 at up to 172x lower cost.
items.text_zh: 思科 Foundation AI 发布 Antares 开源权重模型（350M 与 1B），专用于在代码库中定位已知漏洞，1B 版本以最高低 172 倍的成本超过 753B 的 GLM-5.2。

items.text: Fireworks AI's benchmark found open-source Kimi K3 nearly matches Claude Fable 5 overall, and routing between the two beats either alone at up to ~50x lower cost.
items.text_zh: Fireworks AI 评测显示，开源的 Kimi K3 整体准确率几乎追平 Claude Fable 5，而在两者间智能路由的效果超过任一单模型，成本最多可低约 50 倍。

items.text: OpenAI quietly opened an advertising portal at ads.openai.com, inviting brands to buy ad placements inside ChatGPT.
items.text_zh: OpenAI 低调上线广告门户 ads.openai.com，邀请品牌方购买 ChatGPT 内的广告位。

items.text: Nubank founder David Vélez and BNY chief Robin Vince joined the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC.
items.text_zh: Nubank 创始人 David Vélez 与纽约梅隆银行掌门 Robin Vince 加入 OpenAI 基金会及 OpenAI Group PBC 董事会。

items.text: Cursor had a team of AI agents rebuild SQLite in Rust from its 835-page manual, producing a replica that passed 100% of a held-out test suite.
items.text_zh: Cursor 让一组 AI Agent 仅凭 835 页官方手册用 Rust 重写 SQLite，复刻版本通过了 100% 的留出测试集。

items.text: Anthropic is offering grants of up to $50,000 in Claude usage credits to researchers working on cures for rare diseases, its first focused AI-for-science call.
items.text_zh: Anthropic 向攻关罕见病疗法的研究者提供最高 5 万美元的 Claude 用量额度资助，这是其 AI for Science 计划的首个定向征集。

items.text: Music streamer Deezer said more than 50% of tracks uploaded to its platform daily are now fully AI-generated.
items.text_zh: 音乐流媒体 Deezer 表示，其平台如今每日上传的曲目中超过 50% 为完全 AI 生成。

items.text: Xiaomi's Xiaomi-Robotics-1 model shows that scaling training data beats scaling model size when teaching robots manipulation skills.
items.text_zh: 小米的 Xiaomi-Robotics-1 模型表明，在训练机器人操作技能时，扩大训练数据比扩大模型规模更有效。

items.text: Apple researchers published a method to generate synthetic training data for API-calling agents without needing live execution environments.
items.text_zh: Apple 研究人员发布新方法，无需真实执行环境即可为 API 调用类 Agent 生成合成训练数据。

items.text: Tencent Hunyuan unveiled Hyra-1.0, its first research agent built to recursively improve solutions for performance-driven research and engineering tasks.
items.text_zh: 腾讯混元发布首个研究智能体 Hyra-1.0，面向性能导向的研究与工程任务，能够递归式迭代优化解决方案。

items.text: Terence Tao published an analysis of the AI-found Jacobian conjecture counterexample, sharing the ChatGPT session he used to verify calculations on the 87-year-old problem.
items.text_zh: 陶哲轩发文剖析 AI 发现的雅可比猜想反例，并公开了他用来核对计算的 ChatGPT 对话——这一猜想已悬置 87 年。

items.text: Hugging Face's Pollen Robotics open-sourced Grabette, a ~€490 handheld gripper that records human manipulation demos and converts them into robot-ready LeRobot datasets.
items.text_zh: Hugging Face 旗下 Pollen Robotics 开源 Grabette：一个物料成本约 490 欧元的手持夹爪，用人手录制操作演示即可自动生成 LeRobot 格式的机器人训练数据。

items.text: Apple researchers published CalibAtt, a training-free calibrated sparse attention method that accelerates text-to-video generation up to 1.58x end-to-end without quality loss on Wan 2.1 and Mochi.
items.text_zh: 苹果研究团队发布 CalibAtt：一种免训练的校准稀疏注意力方法，在 Wan 2.1、Mochi 等模型上将文生视频端到端提速最高 1.58 倍且不损画质。

items.text: Cognition launched Devin Outposts in alpha, letting Devin Cloud sessions run on private machines and partner infrastructure including NVIDIA Brev, Modal, Cloudflare, E2B, and Daytona.
items.text_zh: Cognition 推出 Devin Outposts（alpha），Devin Cloud 会话可跑在用户自有机器及 NVIDIA Brev、Modal、Cloudflare、E2B、Daytona 等合作基础设施上。

items.text: Meta open-sourced Astryx, an agent-ready React design system with over 150 accessible components, seven themes, and a CLI.
items.text_zh: Meta 开源 Astryx：面向 Agent 的 React 设计系统，含 150+ 无障碍组件、7 套主题和 CLI 工具。

items.text: Tripo partnered with MetaTailor to convert AI-generated clothing meshes into fitted, rigged wearables, making Tripo-generated clothes usable on avatars.
items.text_zh: Tripo 与 MetaTailor 合作，把 AI 生成的服装网格转成贴合、已绑定骨骼的可穿戴资产，生成的衣服真能给角色穿上。

items.text: AnimeGen, a new video model fine-tuned on Alibaba's open-source Wan, debuted specializing in anime-style visuals, showcased by the Wan team as a community application.
items.text_zh: 基于阿里开源模型 Wan 微调的动漫视频模型 AnimeGen 亮相，专攻动漫风格画面，获通义万相官方转发展示。
